name: Nonresident Non-Citizen Asset Situs Exclusion

eligibility.description: Applies to nonresident non-citizens who structure their holdings to ensure assets (such as foreign stock or certain debt obligations) are not considered U.S.-situs property.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes property from the gross estate of a nonresident non-citizen if the property is not legally situated within the United States at the time of death.
